records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/ the length of the outstretched arms. So named because, when at rest, it stretches forward its fore legs like arms.]

defs: A genus of bombycid moths whose caterpillars (esp. those of Orgyia leucostigma) are often very injurious to fruit trees and shade trees. The female is wingless. Called also vaporer moth.
